case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. OSCAR FERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,016.36 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.00) SERVED JUN-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, OSCAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-28-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO SC-109 SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-06-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY.PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HUGO HERRERA--COLLECTION'S AGENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-26-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. ELIZABETH LOPEZ-LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES-LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERNANDEZ, OSCAR $1,016.36 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,091.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
